TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Johnny_Bach, title = Johnny_Bach, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Johnny_Bach} }

S.FORM: Johnny Bach sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 7, Johnny Bach, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Johnny Bach sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 7, Johnny Bach, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħnnj βaʦ~ʨħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħnnj βaʦ~ʨħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
